prompt: log in with username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce', then verify the products page appears
summary: Verifies that logging in with standard_user/secret_sauce on saucedemo.com redirects to the inventory page and displays the Products header. (healed: Updated the login button name from "Sign In" to "Login" to match the current page.) (refined: Added assertions that the shopping cart link is visible and that no cart badge is displayed after login; note that the cart elements aren't in the login-page ARIA snapshot, so these rely on SauceDemo's known data-test attributes on the inventory page.)
